headline: Barry Diller Offers to Buy MGM Resorts. The Stock Jumps 14%.
summary: People Inc. offers to acquire MGM Resorts for $48.30 a share in cash, valuing the casino operator at roughly $18 billion.

headline: The Corporate EmpowHER Team Member Resource Group for Women Creates Connections Locally and Globally
